description: Contiguous Gold substage windows for a selected well and TD stage.
sql: SELECT * FROM (WITH base AS (SELECT substage AS substage_label, CAST(datetime_fmt AS timestamp) AS ts FROM featurestore:live_gold_labels_v1 WHERE name = :well_name AND stage_num_td = :stage_num AND datetime_fmt IS NOT NULL AND substage IS NOT NULL AND LOWER(substage) <> 'na'), marked AS (SELECT substage_label, ts, CASE WHEN LAG(substage_label) OVER (ORDER BY ts) IS DISTINCT FROM substage_label THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_new_group FROM base), grouped AS (SELECT substage_label, ts, SUM(is_new_group) OVER (ORDER BY ts ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING) AS group_id FROM marked) SELECT substage_label, MIN(ts) AS start_ts, MAX(ts) AS end_ts, CASE LOWER(substage_label) WHEN 'pad' THEN '#6F64C7' WHEN 'prop' THEN '#C98A2E' WHEN 'flush' THEN '#4B9F63' ELSE '#5F8FD6' END AS color, COUNT(*) AS sample_count FROM grouped GROUP BY group_id, substage_label ORDER BY MIN(ts)) q
